title: Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (disambiguation)
content:
'''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed''' may refer to:

*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', the overall multimedia project
**''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', the [[Star Wars video games|video game]]
**[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'']], the novelization
**[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (graphic novel)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'']], the comic
**''[[The Art and Making of Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', the "art of" book
**[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (webstrip)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'']], the webstrip
**[[The Force Unleashed (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Star Wars Miniatures: The Force Unleashed'']], a Star Wars Miniatures set
**''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'', the sequel to the original ''The Force Unleashed''
**[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''The Force Unleashed II'']], the sequel novelization
**[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (graphic novel)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'']], the sequel comic
